creator: smile.neversmile@gmail.com
text:
Fix: PORTNAME=      linkchecker
-PORTVERSION=   6.6
+PORTVERSION=   8.2
 CATEGORIES=    www python
 MASTER_SITES=  SF/${PORTNAME}/${PORTVERSION}/
 DISTNAME=      LinkChecker-${PORTVERSION}
@@ -15,9 +15,9 @@

 OPTIONS_DEFINE=        GUI NLS

-LICENSE=       GPLv2
+#LICENSE=      GPLv2
 
-USE_BZIP2=     yes
+USE_XZ=                yes
 USE_PYTHON=            2.5+
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=       yes
 INSTALLS_EGGINFO=      yes
